name: Sentry
description: Sentry is an application monitoring and error tracking platform. Capture, triage, and resolve errors and performance issues across your stack in real-time.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects accessible to the authenticated user across organizations.

capabilities.name: list_issues
capabilities.description: List error issues for a project with filtering by status, priority, and query.

capabilities.name: get_issue_details
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific issue including stacktrace and events.

capabilities.name: resolve_issue
capabilities.description: Update an issue's status to resolved, ignored, or unresolved.

capabilities.name: list_events
capabilities.description: List recent error events for a project with full stacktraces and context.

capabilities.name: create_alert_rule
capabilities.description: Create an alert rule to get notified when specific error conditions are met.
